# PNG Test Fixtures
---

These images were all generated with commands following the form of
`terminal-life --reset-random ....`

For various rules and modes. Included are:

 - basic life-like and LtL rules
 - life-like phase diagrams with smoothstep activation
 - LtL phase diagrams with sin activation
 - variations of the above with change rates
 - LtL rule phase diagrams
